description: JSON objects that from_json must reject with Error::InvalidInput because the hash field is not a canonical 64-character hash hex string. The height is a valid unsigned integer in every case so the failure is attributable to the hash alone.

invalid.name: hash_non_hex
invalid.reason: 64 chars but contains a non-hex character

invalid.name: hash_prefixed
invalid.reason: 0x-prefixed; not a bare canonical 64-char hash hex string
